sidebar.quickNav: Quick access to the most important screens for your current role.
notifications.emptyDescription: Order and document alerts will appear here.
manual.currentDescription: Read the guide for the current page, review the related buttons and fields, or search across the help system.
manual.libraryDescription: Browse role-based guides, categories, and screenshot-supported workflow instructions.
manual.searchCurrent: Search screens, buttons, fields, and workflows
manual.searchLibrary: Search guide titles and workflow pages
manual.rolePreviewRestricted: Role preview requires help-guide admin access
manual.title: Title
manual.noGuideSelected: Select a guide to read the full manual page.
manual.noContextHelpTitle: No contextual help is available yet
manual.noContextHelpDescription: Add screen, field, action, workflow, and screenshot guidance from Help Guide Management to make this page self-explanatory.
manual.permissionFilterNote: The system still applies backend role and permission filtering even when generic guidance exists elsewhere in the library.
manual.noGuidesMatch: No guides match the current search and filters.
manual.table.emptyActions: No contextual button help is available for this screen yet.
manual.table.emptyFields: No field-level help is available for this screen yet.
manual.table.emptyWorkflow: No workflow guidance is available for this status.
manual.launchDescription: The manual library opens automatically from this page. Use it to search screens, daily workflows, and role-specific screenshots.
manual.launchTip1: Search by screen or function name such as orders, advertisements, or providers.
manual.launchTip2: Switch language from the top bar to preview the end-user text you expect to show.
manual.launchTip3: Open the manual from any screen to jump directly into its contextual guide.
screen.manualAddScreenshots: How to Add Screenshots to the Manual
